title: Takara PrimeSTAR HS PCR
description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR HS DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction, no long initial denaturation, 72 C / 1 min per kb.

payload.notes: Vendor: Takara Bio, PrimeSTAR HS DNA Polymerase (Cat. R010A). Takara recommends NO long initial denaturation step (cycling begins directly at 98 C/10 sec); for denaturation below 94 C use 10-15 sec. Annealing default 55 C; annealing TIME should be only 5 sec (primer Tm >= 55 C) or 15 sec (Tm < 55 C), since high priming efficiency causes smearing with longer times. The 55 C shown is the default starting point. Extension 72 C, 1 min/kb (use 68 C for a 2-step protocol with high-Tm primers). 30 cycles. Primers 10-15 pmol (0.2-0.3 uM) per 50 uL. The manual publishes no separate final-extension or hold step. Source: https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/R010A_e.v1905Da.pdf
